items.name: base
items.title: C2 Base
items.description: Dark-default C2 design-system bootstrap: tokens, Tailwind v4 theme CSS, dependencies, aliases, and core primitives.
items.docs: C2 is dark by default. The generated CSS partial includes a .light opt-in block; add class="light" only around preview surfaces that intentionally need it.

items.name: theme
items.title: C2 Theme
items.description: Thin C2 token theme for apps that already have their own shadcn base setup. For new apps, install @c2/base instead.

items.name: utils
items.title: cn()
items.description: Tailwind class-merge helper (clsx + tailwind-merge). The foundation every C2 component imports.

items.name: use-mobile
items.title: useIsMobile
items.description: Hook that detects mobile viewport via matchMedia.

items.name: tokens
items.title: Design Tokens
items.description: CORE surface/elevation/text/action tokens plus the C2 threat-accent domain tokens. Generated from tokens/*.json; the single source of color truth.

items.name: accordion
items.title: Accordion
items.description: Vertically collapsing content panels.

items.name: alert
items.title: Alert
items.description: Callout for important messages.

items.name: alert-dialog
items.title: AlertDialog
items.description: Modal dialog for destructive or irreversible actions.

items.name: aspect-ratio
items.title: AspectRatio
items.description: Constrains content to a given aspect ratio.

items.name: avatar
items.title: Avatar
items.description: User or entity avatar with fallback.

items.name: badge
items.title: Badge
items.description: Small label for status, category, or count.

items.name: breadcrumb
items.title: Breadcrumb
items.description: Navigation breadcrumb trail.

items.name: button
items.title: Button
items.description: Primary action button with multiple variants and sizes.

items.name: calendar
items.title: Calendar
items.description: Date picker calendar component.

items.title: Card
items.description: Container for grouped content with header, body, and footer.

items.name: carousel
items.title: Carousel
items.description: Scrollable carousel with navigation controls.

items.name: chart
items.title: Chart
items.description: Chart container with theme-aware tooltip and legend.

items.name: checkbox
items.title: Checkbox
items.description: Toggle checkbox control.

items.title: Collapsible
items.description: Expandable/collapsible content section.

items.description: Command palette with search and keyboard navigation.

items.name: context-menu

items.description: Right-click context menu.

items.name: dialog
items.title: Dialog
items.description: Modal dialog overlay.

items.name: drawer

items.description: Slide-out drawer panel.

items.name: dropdown-menu

items.description: Dropdown menu triggered by a button.

items.title: Form
items.description: Form primitives with react-hook-form integration.

items.description: Card that appears on hover.

items.name: input
items.title: Input
items.description: Text input field.

items.name: input-otp
items.title: InputOTP
items.description: One-time password input with slots.

items.name: label
items.title: Label
items.description: Accessible form label.

items.name: menubar
items.title: Menubar
items.description: Horizontal menu bar with submenus.

items.name: pagination
items.title: Pagination
items.description: Page navigation controls.

items.name: popover
items.title: Popover
items.description: Floating popover anchored to a trigger.

items.name: progress
items.title: Progress
items.description: Horizontal progress bar.

items.title: RadioGroup
items.description: Radio button group for single selection.

items.description: Resizable panel layout.

items.description: Dropdown select menu.

items.name: separator
items.title: Separator
items.description: Visual divider between sections.

items.title: Sheet
items.description: Slide-over panel from the edge of the screen.

items.title: Sidebar
items.description: Application sidebar with responsive mobile drawer.

items.title: Skeleton
items.description: Loading placeholder animation.

items.description: Range slider input.

items.title: Sonner
items.description: Toast notification system.

items.title: Switch
items.description: Toggle switch control.

items.name: table
items.title: Table
items.description: Data table with header, body, and footer.

items.title: Tabs
items.description: Tabbed content switcher.

items.name: textarea
items.title: Textarea
items.description: Multi-line text input.

items.name: toggle
items.title: Toggle
items.description: Two-state toggle button.

items.name: toggle-group
items.title: ToggleGroup
items.description: Group of toggle buttons with single or multi selection.

items.name: tooltip
items.title: Tooltip
items.description: Informational popup on hover.

items.name: map-marker-states
items.title: Map Marker States
items.description: Affiliation palettes, interaction states, and marker style resolver for tactical map markers.

items.name: status-chip
items.title: StatusChip
items.description: Activity status indicator chip with semantic color coding.

items.name: action-button
items.title: ActionButton
items.description: Primary action trigger with icon, loading spinner, tooltip, and variant support.

items.name: split-action-button
items.title: SplitActionButton
items.description: Two-segment button — primary action + dropdown menu for effector controls.

items.name: accordion-section
items.title: AccordionSection
items.description: Collapsible section with animated expand/collapse for card interiors.

items.name: telemetry-row
items.title: TelemetryRow
items.description: Single telemetry metric row with icon, label, and monospace value.

items.name: new-updates-pill
items.title: NewUpdatesPill
items.description: Floating pill that surfaces new incoming detection count.

items.name: filter-bar
items.title: FilterBar
items.description: Search, sort, and multi-select filter controls. Requires domain types (ActivityStatus, FilterState) from consumer app.

items.name: card-header
items.title: CardHeader
items.description: Target card header with icon, title, subtitle, status badge, and collapse chevron.

items.name: card-actions
items.title: CardActions
items.description: Action bar with grouped effector/investigation layout and confirm dialogs.

items.name: card-details
items.title: CardDetails
items.description: Collapsible telemetry accordion with copy-all and 3-column grid layout.

items.name: card-sensors
items.title: CardSensors
items.description: Sensor list with type, distance, and timestamp for each detecting sensor.

items.name: card-media
items.title: CardMedia
items.description: Image/video slot for surveillance feed with live badge, playback controls, and lightbox.

items.name: card-log
items.title: CardLog
items.description: Chronological event log accordion with expand-all.

items.name: card-closure
items.title: CardClosure
items.description: Outcome selection grid for closing a detection event.

items.name: card-timeline
items.title: CardTimeline
items.description: Vertical step timeline showing detection lifecycle stages.

items.name: card-footer-dock
items.title: CardFooterDock
items.description: Sticky footer action dock for card bottom actions.

items.name: target-card
items.title: TargetCard
items.description: Core detection card shell with collapsible body and slot composition.

items.name: map-marker
items.title: MapMarker
items.description: Tactical map marker with affiliation colors, heading indicator, and interaction states.

items.name: map-icons
items.title: MapIcons
items.description: SVG icons for card headers — DroneCardIcon, MissileCardIcon, JamWaveIcon.

items.name: core
items.title: Core bundle
items.description: Brand-agnostic foundation — cn() helper, design tokens, and the full generic shadcn UI set. No C2 tactical domain. Theme by swapping token primitives.

items.name: domain-primitives
items.title: Domain primitives
items.description: Default C2 bundle — design tokens, card building blocks, tactical primitives, and map markers (excludes generic shadcn UI and FilterBar).

items.name: map-kit
items.title: Map kit
items.description: Map visualization only — marker state tokens, MapMarker, and MapIcons.

items.name: all
items.title: All Components
items.description: Meta-package that installs everything — the core bundle plus all C2 tactical domain primitives.
